transcript.text:
I don't want this place to be known
But I'll let you guys know!
[Kimchi Stew]
[Stone pot rice]
[5 of them!]
[Over rice]
[Wrapped in dried seaweed]
[Add noodles]
[This is it]
[It's making her eat vegetables?!]
Hello everyone
I'm going to a place I regularly enjoy
I used to eat here a lot, but they probably won't know because they're very popular
Comedian Kwon Jae Kwan first showed me this place
That place is literally #1
Let's go after we drop off Tzuyang

Without me?
You're going to eat again?
Had it once that day and became a fan ever since
I've been craving it since I've been at Ulleung Island
I had to come right away
[Dwaeji-Jip] [City of Gwangmyeong, Gyeonggi Province]
You can already smell it from out here
Hello~!
I love this place because their food comes out right away
Can I get 5 servings, please?
That's a lot of food
More the merrier
It comes with stone pot rice
I'll take 5 of those as well
Here you are
Extra kimchi on the side, please

A lot, please
You just need to cook it from here
Looks good
They give you a lot of onions Is that why it's so good?
There's nothing special in here
But it has a distinct taste
The dish doesn't dry up even if you keep boiling it
Probably because the onion gives out water
So many onions
Our producer and editor love this place too
You want some, right?
Look how it has more soup now
It seems ready
Looks yummy
Scrape it so the pork doesn't get burned on the bottom
I've analyzed it and I think there's no special broth for this

I think the onions produce the broth
Onion water broth
The dish really didn't come with all this soup at first
The onions make the soup as you cook it
That's where the taste comes from
I knew it!
I don't like onions, but I eat them here
[Some soup first]
Wait, It's gotten better
Really
How did it get better?| So good!
How is it this delicious
There are many times I need to wait in line
I don't want this place to be known
But I'll let you guys know!
Please let it sit for 2~3 minutes before you open it

Okay Wow, stone pot rice
Hurry hurry
This is difficult
You can eat the rice now Enjoy
Thank you Looks delicious
[Move it over to the bowl]
Pour water in here
That sizzling sound
Let's prep 2 bowls of rice
1 is not enough
Finally it's time to eat
The stone pot rice is incredible
The rice itself is tasty
How's this possible?
It's crazy
This is how you eat it

Get a scoop of it
Get it on your rice
[You know the rest]
[Can't help but clap]
Excuse me,
Can I have dried seaweed?
Thank you
Some meat
And kimchi
Wow, it's so good
Mixing it is good too,
But eating them separately is amazing too
[Like this!]
[Just like this!]
Dried seaweed on top
This tastes way too good

On top
You guys know I don't eat onions and other vegetables
But I eat all the onions here
How is it this delicious?
Get some on here
And mix it
There's a reason why they're so popular
Always a waitlist for dinners
Even if they have a lot of seats
This place showed me that onions can be tasty
That's so good
[3rd stone pot rice]
[Repeating the steps]
[Another one]
I will mix it all up in a bit
Cut it all up

My arm hurts
But this is all for a bigger cause
There is a way
Scissor-hands
Get some soup on here too
The flavor is so deep
I'm going to eat a big spoonful
Should I use this instead?
Will this fit?
It works
It's really yummy
I need to thank Mr. Kim for showing me this place
Should I give him a call?
Hello
I'm eating it right now
That place is so good

I seriously come here so much
It's the best
Early congrats on 100k subscribers on your channel
It's stuck at 94k It won't go up from there
I'll subscribe!
Wait, I already did
Are you not subscribed?
I already subscribed!
Let's come here together next time
Thank you
He will have 100k subscribers soon
Take a look at his channel if you can
Show lots of love
Let's eat now!
That's a lot of seaweed
This is so good

It's gotten better Is it because of the dried seaweed?
Let's get a huge scoop
I'm not too good at eating stew-like foods So I tend to leave leftovers
Can't do that with this though
Last stone pot rice
It's my 5th one
Scorched rice at the bottom
Can you see that?
I'm supposed to let it sit for a while
I should've waited some time for the others too
It's all clean now
Check that out
Let's get it over-rice now
Take a look at the crispy rice
I have an idea
Should I try to make this from home?

It won't be the same, right?
Now for rice water
[Well..?]
What? This is porridge
[It soaked up all the water]
Let's check the other ones then
[Still porridge]
[Porridge]
[Porridge too]
Wait,
What happened?
I think it's better to order ramyun noodles at this point
Excuse me, 1 ramyun, please
Let's add water and cook it
Our PD loves this over here
I'll give him some

Have some
Order a bowl of rice too
PD: 1 bowl of rice, please
The visualization of this can bring world peace
It looks scrumptious
I've failed all of them
They're all like this
I didn't take that long though Maybe I needed to add more water
Ramyun noodles will never fail me
That smell
That kimchi ramyun smell
This is how a kimchi ramyun is supposed to be
It's perfect
I will leave nothing behind
It's like finishing it up with soup and rice
It got all over my top

It means that I was that invested in eating
[Finished!]
Do you see this? I ate all the onions
Thanks everyone! [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
